prompt: Edit REFERENCE 1 by CLEANING UP the matte black label on the capsule pill bottle — remove any minor scratches, scuff lines, wear marks, dust specks, or small imperfections on the label surface so the label looks like a pristine, brand-new, unblemished product label. The label should read as perfect, clean matte black with crisp white ink. Keep absolutely everything else in REFERENCE 1 IDENTICAL: same hand, skin, grip, finger positions, bottle body (same shape, same clear glass, same silver cap, same white capsules inside), same label text and logo, same label position, same scene and background, same top-down overhead camera angle, same tight close-up crop, same composition, same lighting (direction, color temperature, contrast, shadows, specular highlights on the label), same depth of field, same color grade, same 5:4 framing, same mood. The cleaned-up label must still look naturally lit by the scene — matching the scene's ambient tone, key light direction, and shadow physics — NOT studio-clean or artificially bright. Photorealistic, seamless label retouch only, editorial lifestyle quality, crisp focus, no artifacts.
